title: Turning Notifications into Tasks
excerpt:

posts.author: mitchellgp (Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml:
We think if we had an option to turn a notification or inbox message straight into a task from within the notification its self we’d find that incredibly useful!

We have our own little to do lists and some even use monday.com to manage all of their work related tasks.

We’ve had two staff members ask if it was possible to turn comments or notifications into a task to save for later. Whether this created an item in your own to do list board, saved it in a seperate section of notifications or even added it to the My Work section, it’d be so handy!

Would just save a little bit of time manually adding to our to do lists. The feature request is is a “nice to have”, not a deal breaker by any means! Some of us just like to automate everything we can.
